form.label: ZKSplunk Component Detail
form.description: Drilldown detail for one monitored component. Public metadata only; no private Midnight state is read.

html.div:
Component: $component$ — Back to overview — Open the MCP/chat analyst →
Privacy boundary: ZKSplunk monitors public infrastructure metadata and public unshielded activity only. Shielded balances, witnesses, parties, and amounts remain private.

search.query: index=zksplunk (sourcetype="midnight:vitals" OR sourcetype="zksplunk:connector" OR sourcetype="midnight:contracts") component="$component$" earliest=$field_time.earliest$ latest=$field_time.latest$ | sort 0 -_time | head 1 | eval current_status=coalesce(status,severity,"unknown") | fields current_status

index=zksplunk (sourcetype="midnight:vitals" OR sourcetype="midnight:contracts") component="$component$" response_time_ms=* earliest=$field_time.earliest$ latest=$field_time.latest$ | stats latest(response_time_ms) as response_time_ms

index=zksplunk (sourcetype="midnight:vitals" OR sourcetype="zksplunk:connector" OR sourcetype="midnight:contracts" OR sourcetype="midnight:chain") component="$component$" earliest=$field_time.earliest$ latest=$field_time.latest$ | stats count as events

index=zksplunk component="$component$" earliest=$field_time.earliest$ latest=$field_time.latest$ | where status="critical" OR severity="critical" OR send_status="failed" | stats count as critical_events

index=zksplunk (sourcetype="midnight:vitals" OR sourcetype="zksplunk:connector" OR sourcetype="midnight:contracts") component="$component$" earliest=$field_time.earliest$ latest=$field_time.latest$ | eval status=coalesce(status,severity,"unknown") | timechart span=1m count by status

index=zksplunk (sourcetype="midnight:vitals" OR sourcetype="midnight:contracts") component="$component$" response_time_ms=* earliest=$field_time.earliest$ latest=$field_time.latest$ | timechart span=1m avg(response_time_ms) as avg_ms perc95(response_time_ms) as p95_ms

index=zksplunk (sourcetype="midnight:vitals" OR sourcetype="zksplunk:connector" OR sourcetype="midnight:contracts") component="$component$" earliest=$field_time.earliest$ latest=$field_time.latest$ | sort 0 -_time | head 1 | eval t=strftime(_time,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | table t type status severity response_time_ms probe_name endpoint http_status graphql_errors_count message error_name error_message

index=zksplunk sourcetype="midnight:vitals" component="wallet" type="midnight.wallet.boundary" earliest=$field_time.earliest$ latest=$field_time.latest$ | sort 0 -_time | head 10 | eval t=strftime(_time,"%H:%M:%S") | table t status wallet_network wallet_address unshielded_tx_count unshielded_created_utxos unshielded_spent_utxos unshielded_token_types unshielded_primary_balance indexer_highest_tx_id wallet_balance_shielded_private message

index=zksplunk sourcetype="zksplunk:connector" earliest=$field_time.earliest$ latest=$field_time.latest$ | sort 0 -_time | head 20 | eval t=strftime(_time,"%H:%M:%S") | table t type status severity send_status total_events_sent total_events_failed failed_events_since_last_heartbeat queued_events average_latency_ms batch_event_count send_attempt hec_response_code message error_message

index=zksplunk sourcetype="midnight:chain" type="midnight.chain.block_latest" earliest=$field_time.earliest$ latest=$field_time.latest$ | timechart span=1m latest(block_height) as block_height latest(block_age_seconds) as block_age_seconds

index=zksplunk component="$component$" earliest=$field_time.earliest$ latest=$field_time.latest$ | sort 0 -_time | eval t=strftime(_time,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | table t sourcetype type component status severity response_time_ms message error_message | head 100
